items.name: Sword of the Lands
items.description: Strike a blow for land kind when you use the Sword of the Lands!  Each hit will do 15 damage.  Hit the 'Q' key to create a giant land mass to raise you up towards the heavens and surround yourself with Earth, which you then fire at your foes below.
